name: GStack
subtitle: by Garry Tan
description: Turn Claude Code into a virtual software development team. 15 opinionated skills that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA.
author: garrytan

skills.name: office-hours
skills.description: Product discovery through 6 forcing questions before coding begins

skills.name: plan-ceo-review
skills.description: Rethinks problem scope — finds the 10-star product hiding in your request

skills.name: plan-eng-review
skills.description: Locks architecture via diagrams, test matrices, and failure mode analysis

skills.name: plan-design-review
skills.description: Rates design dimensions 0-10 with AI slop detection

skills.name: autoplan
skills.description: Runs CEO, design, and eng reviews automatically in sequence

skills.name: ship
skills.description: Syncs main, runs tests, audits coverage, and opens pull requests

skills.name: land-and-deploy
skills.description: Merges PRs, waits for CI, deploys to production, verifies health

skills.name: review
skills.description: Finds bugs that pass CI but fail in production — N+1 queries, race conditions, trust boundaries

skills.name: codex
skills.description: Cross-model code review via OpenAI Codex CLI with adversarial challenge mode

skills.name: cso
skills.description: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE threat modeling with concrete exploit scenarios

skills.name: investigate
skills.description: Systematic root-cause debugging — no fixes without investigation

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Real Chromium browser control at ~100ms per command for testing

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Tests app flows in real browser, finds bugs, fixes with atomic commits

skills.name: qa-only
skills.description: Same as /qa but report-only — no code changes

skills.name: retro
skills.description: Weekly retrospectives with per-person breakdowns and shipping streaks

skills.name: document-release
skills.description: Updates all project docs to match recent changes

skills.name: design-consultation
skills.description: Builds complete design systems with landscape research and mockups

skills.name: design-shotgun
skills.description: Generates multiple design variants with comparison boards

skills.name: design-review
skills.description: Design audit with implementation fixes and before/after screenshots

skills.name: benchmark
skills.description: Page load, Core Web Vitals, and resource size baselines per PR

skills.name: canary
skills.description: Post-deployment monitoring for console errors and performance regressions

skills.name: connect-chrome
skills.description: Launches your Chrome with Side Panel extension for live activity feed

skills.name: setup-browser-cookies
skills.description: Imports cookies from real browsers into headless sessions

skills.name: setup-deploy
skills.description: One-time setup for /land-and-deploy — detects platform and deploy commands

skills.name: careful
skills.description: Warns before destructive commands like rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push

skills.name: freeze
skills.description: Restricts file edits to one directory while debugging

skills.name: guard
skills.description: Combines /careful + /freeze for maximum safety

skills.name: unfreeze
skills.description: Removes freeze boundary to restore full edit access
